cold_open: wry and relatable, a low slumped couch feeling that lifts into curious intrigue
setup: gently curious, recognizing a familiar everyday feeling, light and inquisitive
the_turn: a bright dawning realization, the reframe clicking into place, hopeful and clever
escalate: light and playful, little gears and calculations turning, witty and curious
the_history_turn: a curious step back in time, warm desert mystery, a touch of ancient intrigue
escalate_history: intriguing and a little mischievous, an old sin revealed, playful suspense
the_second_history_turn: purposeful and building, a steady industrious factory pulse, momentum
human_layer: warm, reassuring and kind, a gentle understanding glow, soft and grounding
payoff: hopeful and uplifting, light and empowering, a sense of relief and possibility opening
button: warm and resolved, a knowing gentle close with a small smile
